description: Reviewed standard-scoped alignment aliases for H4G textbook-unit matching. These aliases do not change official standard text and must not be treated as global subject synonyms.

aliases.rationale: The H4G8 real-number standard explicitly includes 二次根式; 人教八下 16.1 二次根式 and 冀教八下 15.1 二次根式 are grade-appropriate unit titles.
aliases.note: Do not generalize this into a global 实数 alias because H4G7 实数 near misses include unsafe 数轴/有理数 units.

aliases.rationale: The H4G8 definition/proposition/theorem/proof standard explicitly mentions 反证法; 冀教八下 17.5 反证法 is a narrow proof-method unit.
aliases.note: This is scoped to the proof standard only and is not a general substitute for 命题、定理与证明.

aliases.rationale: The H4G9 projection/view/net standard includes 投影、视图 and 三视图 concepts; 人教九下 第二十九章 投影与视图 / 29.1 投影 / 29.2 三视图 are direct title matches.
aliases.note: 展开图 evidence remains provided by 冀教 32.3; this alias only recovers 人教 projection/view units after page-start recovery.
